subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.38
question_html:
How should a measurement of 5.00 g from a balance be recorded?

A. 5.00 ± 0.1 g

B. 5.00 ± 0.01 g

C. 5.00 ± 1 g

D. 5.00 ± 0.001 g
examiners_html: More than 85 % of candidates were able to identify a correct uncertainty, however not a good discriminating question.
